summary: Completed testing of iteration 8 features: JWT 30-day expiry, SAML home_url field, PWA support, logo upload, and UI verification. Found and fixed 1 bug: home_url was not being saved when creating new SAML apps. All 12 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified working correctly.

fixed.issue: home_url field was not being saved when creating new SAML apps
fixed.fix: Added home_url to app_doc in create_saml_app function (line 811)

passed_tests: JWT token expiry is 30 days (720 hours) - VERIFIED
SAML App GET returns home_url field
SAML App PUT updates home_url correctly
Launcher apps endpoint returns home_url for SAML apps
PWA manifest.json accessible with correct config (standalone, start_url=/launcher)
Service worker sw.js accessible with fetch event handlers
Logo upload POST /api/upload/logo accepts images and returns URL
Logo upload rejects non-image files with 400 error
Dashboard stats returns all required fields
SAML App creation with home_url now works (after fix)
App Launcher shows tile view with app name and description
SAML Apps form has Home URL (Post-SSO Redirect) field
SAML Apps form has logo upload input
critical_code_review_comments: SAMLAppCreate model has home_url field defined
Launcher endpoint correctly returns home_url in response
AppLauncher.js correctly passes home_url as relay_state when launching SAML apps
PWA manifest has correct standalone display and /launcher start_url
Service worker implements network-first caching strategy
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 8 features verified working: 1) JWT 30-day expiry, 2) SAML home_url field (fixed bug where it wasn't saved on create), 3) App Launcher tile view with relay_state, 4) PWA manifest and service worker, 5) Logo upload endpoint. The home_url field is now properly saved when creating SAML apps and returned in launcher/apps endpoint.

verified_features.jwt_30_day_expiry: JWT_EXPIRATION_HOURS=720 verified in token exp claim
verified_features.saml_home_url_field: SAMLAppCreate accepts home_url, stored in DB, returned in API
verified_features.launcher_relay_state: AppLauncher.js passes home_url as relay_state parameter
verified_features.service_worker: /sw.js accessible with install, activate, fetch handlers
verified_features.logo_upload: POST /api/upload/logo accepts images, returns URL, rejects non-images
verified_features.admin_dashboard: 8 stat cards and 6 quick action cards displayed

bug_fixed.description: home_url field was not being saved when creating new SAML apps
bug_fixed.root_cause: create_saml_app function in server.py was missing home_url in app_doc dictionary
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added 'home_url': app.home_url to app_doc in create_saml_app function
